title: Alien Escape
description: A local co-op platformer where players escape an alien planet. Developed as an exercise during a programming course. Used Jypeli game library (by University of Jyväskylä) for physics and rendering.
tasks: Designed co-op movement and collision systems
Implemented enemy AI and level transitions

title: TaskFlow
tasks: Built command parsing and workflow execution
Created plugin support for developer tools

title: ACME Corp
description: Worked on payment infrastructure and reliability improvements.
tasks: Improved service availability and error handling
Collaborated with frontend and QA teams
